name: Disney+ Hotstar
tagline: Mass-market Telugu streaming with strong ties to Star network's regional slate.
intro: Disney+ Hotstar, rebranded in India as JioHotstar following the 2024 merger, is one of the most widely subscribed streaming platforms in the country and a major window for Telugu cinema, particularly theatrical releases with broad family audiences. The platform's Telugu catalogue spans Disney's own acquisitions, Star-branded television productions brought to streaming, and a growing slate of direct-to-OTT premieres. For viewers on lower data plans, Hotstar's mobile-first pricing tiers have made it the default streaming app in many households across the Telugu-speaking states. Our directory tracks every Telugu film and series with a confirmed Hotstar streaming window, updated daily from the platform's public listings and official release announcements. Each entry has a dedicated page with the streaming date, content type, and whatever enriched metadata — cast, genre, runtime — our sources have indexed for it.
